case_title: DANIEL R. DAWKINS VS. DANIEL ESPINOZA-LEWIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAWKINS, DANIEL R. AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOZA-LEWIS, DANIEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-01-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-29-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-09-2015
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST DANIEL R. DAWKINS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-12-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-29-2015. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-12-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-01-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-12-2015 CONTINUED TO AUG-11-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 15209068)
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-12-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-11-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 15026038): PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR PETSAS, KOSTA JERRY AS ATTORNEY FOR DAWKINS, DANIEL R.
